title: gtq-03-first-quantum-state

lossless_compression.reason: No live source file found for semantic addressing.

extracted_equations.text: = the wavefunction of a quantum system.
= orthonormal basis eigenstates. Plain English: Before measurement, the system genuinely is in both states at once, weighted by amplitudes that square to 1. Pre-Fall Moral Superposition
= the coherent state of pre-Fall reality.

= the two moral eigenstates available before the Fall. Plain English: Eden held both moral outcomes as simultaneously real until the federal observer triggered the measurement. Symmetry Breaking Potential
= mass term controlling instability of the symmetric point.
= quartic coupling, ensuring stable minima. Plain English: Above the critical temperature the system sits at
= Tree of Life as a coherence-stabilizer operator: maintains negentropic conditions.

= Tree of Knowledge as a measurement operator: forces eigenstate resolution. Plain English: Two distinct operators acting on the same system — one keeps it coherent, the other forces collapse. They do not commute, so triggering

= statistical significance over the multi-decade Princeton dataset. Effect size ≈ one part in ten thousand deviation from chance, correlated with operator intent on random event generators. Plain English: Small but real and replicated — consciousness is not a passive observer of quantum systems. Glossary Key terms used in this article. Definitions are drawn from how the article itself uses each term. Superposition A quantum state in which multiple eigenstates are simultaneously real, weighted by amplitudes. Not observer ignorance — the system genuinely has no definite value until measurement. Wavefunction (
chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C

Logos Coupling The interaction architecture between the Logos field and embedded subsystems — the channel structure that determines how the field acts on a measurement. Field = pervasive substrate; coupling = how interactions occur within it. (Defined in detail in Article 01.)

claims.text: Paul writes with clinical precision across three texts: "Therefore, just as sin came into the world through one man, and death through sin, and so death spread to all men because all sinned." — Romans 5:12 "For as by the one man's disobedience the many were made sinners, so by the one man's obedience the many will be made righteous." — Romans 5:19 "For as in Adam all die, so also in Christ shall all be made alive." — 1 Corinthians 15:22 "Adam was not deceived, but the woman was deceived and became a transgressor." — 1 Timothy 2:14 The doctrine of federal headship holds that Adam served as the representative head of humanity.
